hibernate-mapping.sql-query: UPDATE cabinet..ROI_CountryLOV SET Default_Country = 'False'; UPDATE cabinet..ROI_CountryLOV SET Default_Country = 'True' WHERE Country_Code = :countryCode
SELECT ROI_CountryLovID countrySeq, Country_Code countryCode, Country_Name countryName, Default_Country defaultCountry FROM cabinet..ROI_CountryLOV
